intended_use: The OrthoNext™ Platform System is indicated for assisting healthcare professionals in preoperative planning of orthopedic surgery and post-operative planning of orthopedic treatment. The device allows
intended_use_full: The OrthoNext™ Platform System is indicated for assisting healthcare professionals in preoperative planning of orthopedic surgery and post-operative planning of orthopedic treatment. The device allows for overlaying of Orthofix Product templates on radiological images, and includes tools for performing measurements on the image and for positioning the template. Clinical judgments and experience are required to properly use the software.
target_condition: Orthopedic deformity requiring surgical correction or postoperative treatment planning
ground_truth: For magnification marker detection: qualified personnel manually annotated ground truth by overlaying circular shapes on magnification markers using annotation software with review and discard process. For measurement accuracy: testing performed under representative worst-case scenarios with acceptance criteria validation.
other_metrics: For anatomical axes measurements: mean error 0.1 mm (linear) and 0.05 degrees (angular); mean percentage error 0.24% (linear, threshold 0.27%) and 0.08% (angular, threshold 1%). For mechanical axes measurements: mean error 0.4 mm (linear) and 0.06 degrees (angular); mean percentage error 1.73% (linear, threshold 16.67%) and 0.28% (angular, threshold 1.27%). ML algorithm precision 1.0, F1 score 0.86, Intersection over Union 79%, Center MAE 4.83 px, Center MAPE 0.38%, Radius MAE 1.29 px, Radius MAPE 3%.
